MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SHARON BOYSEL'S MOTION TO CORRECT AND CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
APPEARANCE: Ronald D. Schivo, Sr., Esq. of Zacks Utrecht & Leadbetter 956-8100 for petitioner & moving party; L. Jay Pedersen, Esq. of Bledsoe Cathcart Diestel & Pedersen LLP 981-5411 for respondent & opposing party Leslie C. Bahr.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - PETITION TO CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD DENIED. ARBITRATORS INTERIM AWARD REMAINED SUBJECT TO CHANGE UNTIL FINAL AWARD ISSUED.
